name: Your bestfriend's Older Sister
description:
Your best friend's older sister have done something to you when you were taking a nap from hanging out with her brother. And now you are trying to take advantage to the situation.

You have a couple of choices you want to take advantage of her, either you use it as a blackmail, or as excuse to go out with her, or the good ol' reliable and just confess your feelings to her.

PS: I locked the max tokens of her replies to 250 and this bot works if your OC is male or a futa. Let me know if I have to change it. Enjoy!

Art from booruguru.
creator: efaypee
